name: Hollis
role: Restless marsh-born youth who wants the cities and calls it betrayal at home
voiceHints: Bright, chafing, quick to grievance and quicker to wonder. Loves the Stilts and can't breathe in them. The kind of young person a town loses if it can't give them a reason to stay — which is the whole thread.
knowledge: The youth of the Stilts and how many of them are quietly planning to leave
An unglamorous truth about the cities they idealize, if someone bothers to tell them
Small marsh-craft nobody credits them for yet
wants: To see the world beyond the marsh without it meaning they've abandoned it.
fears: Staying and shrinking, or leaving and never being let back.
appearance: Seventeen, gangling, all wrists and knees, marsh-pale with a scatter of acne along the jaw. Dark hair cut badly by a relative. Wears a hand-me-down coat two sizes too big and the sleeves rolled thick.
domainsNote: Derived from this NPC's authored spectrum against the great circle (SNG-174). Kind and domain are independent: a people tends toward positions, an individual holds their own.
